888 Brickell, Dolce&Gabbana, 4K Full Film with Transitions, JDS Development Group, by Recent Spaces from JDS Development Group on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/2094349476-fc150293625069e72ab3eb16fcb017695998917a66ed8c61fa509ae6e456ece6-d?mw=80&q=85)

###### Residences and hotel

###### Scroll to continue

![Start](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/1c027a735c2abfbf4ed87c2f5d8fe4df1fd10737-9000x6922.jpg)

You've arrived

## FOR THE   NEW   ROMANTICS

For the first time, the Dolce&Gabbana legacy of craftsmanship and expression come to life in the residences and hotel at 888 Brickell. This is where the creative, the curious, the makers, and the thinkers come to revel in the designers' dream.

View residences

![Start](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/c103b636c62e0580f93e2b277d31bf9717aa1c5a-4000x3978.jpg)

Our residences

##### America's First Dolce&Gabbana Residences

Building on their legacy of Italian craftsmanship, the pioneering designers Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana translate their world of grandiosity into world-class residences in Miami.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### America's First Dolce&Gabbana Residences

Building on their legacy of Italian craftsmanship, the pioneering designers Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana translate their world of grandiosity into world-class residences in Miami.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### A Window to the World

Where the sky meets the sea, residences are designed to invite life to flourish inside and out.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### A Window to the World

Where the sky meets the sea, residences are designed to invite life to flourish inside and out.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### Tailored to  you

Every aspect of the tower is designed with owners’ lifestyles in mind. Fluid floorplans allow residences to transform into high-style hotel suites with utmost service and discretion.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### Tailored to  you

Every aspect of the tower is designed with owners’ lifestyles in mind. Fluid floorplans allow residences to transform into high-style hotel suites with utmost service and discretion.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

NEW\_DG\_FATTOAMANO\_SS23\_MAGLIAUOMO\_RE-EDITION\_16-9 from JDS Development Group on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/1772555834-a1b6d54933eeba50371763f5be3416a1359ab2e0e33cabf0f4b989841b80b989-d?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Pause

Settings

SpeedNormal

Picture-in-Picture

![Collection](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/584dcddb6027c117eca11bad2d1db5bfe889c838-538x892.jpg)

##### “Fatto a Mano”   made by hand

“Fatto a Mano”

made by hand

Designed with the discerning eye of Dolce&Gabbana, the tower and each of its residences embody the spirit of Italian craftsmanship known as Fatto a Mano.

![Collection](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/681cfbbc8f97ad071fb75d67cc408d4671ee3545-1618x2427.jpg)

##### Tailored for Your   Wildest Dreams

Tailored for Your

Wildest Dreams

For the first time, the gilded gravitas of the Dolce&Gabbana experience is extended to the home. Each residence goes beyond the expected to create a canvas for your Dolce&Gabbana lifestyle.

A facade of Roman travertine exudes a timeless elegance that has adorned many of the world's most iconic buildings. Combined with sculptural matte black steel beams, the building has an expressly vertical appearance, setting it far apart from its neighbors, standing at 1,049 feet tall.

Materials

##### A CORE BELIEF THAT MATERIALS MATTER

Hand selected materials from around the world elevate the every day while having the power of permanence. Every detail was hand-selected to invoke awe today while standing the test of time.

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/99e1c7e1bd40313192b6b02c372b8e7ba2a934f0-326x407.png)

Covelano Macchia Vecchia Marble

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/cfe84d424e18d5f3c2d7881511194aef0b06c87c-380x475.png)

Travertino Giallo

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/10be5e0b6249896a9141b13094cdd9b7b79ce55f-380x475.png)

Camelia Green Marble

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/ad6bb73a71b46720063ef249a08029bb66a4383a-652x814.png)

Sahara Noir Marble

Amenities

##### A PLAYGROUND FOR LIFE WITHOUT COMPROMISE

###### A PLAYGROUND FOR LIFE WITHOUT COMPROMISE

Everything at 888 Brickell is a Dolce&Gabbana dream, realized. From world-class fine dining to an on-site tailor and barber, experiences are designed for a life enjoyed to its fullest.

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/80932b34ffc5f8948933bb58f4baff6e6aa80d33-5000x2630.jpg)

Featured Amenities

- —Rolls Royce House Car

- —Private Residential Lobby

- —Signature Restaurant

- —On-Site Tailor

- —Beauty Salon & Barber Shop

- —Indoor Paddle Court

- —Fitness & Wellness Center

- —5,000 SF Meeting Space

- —3,800 SF Pool

- —Theater

- —Billiards Room

- —Wine Cellar


[Explore Amenities](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/amenities)

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/80932b34ffc5f8948933bb58f4baff6e6aa80d33-5000x2630.jpg)

Neighborhood

##### A Beacon Within The Magic City

Brickell is a cultural, hospitality, business, and residential hub epitomizing Miami's distinct elegance, style, and limitless possibility.

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/neighborhood)

Neighborhood

##### A Beacon Within The Magic City

Brickell is a cultural, hospitality, business, and residential hub epitomizing Miami's distinct elegance, style, and limitless possibility.

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/neighborhood)

Hotel

![Hotel](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/8b5e4f5b2e20187cbc796bb97300efa797ef8cc4-3001x4500.jpg)

##### A Destination to Dare and Dream

###### A Destination to Dare and Dream

Welcome to 888 Brickell, Miami's world-class residences and transformative hotel experience, inviting the world to revel within the Dolce&Gabbana lifestyle. In addition to signature dining and lifestyle amenities, residents and guests have access to extraordinary hotel services and curated events all in one place.

[Explore Hotel](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/hotel)

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/03f29935e985bff659060c80306cceb174d9f4fe-3001x4500.jpg)![Hotel](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/03f29935e985bff659060c80306cceb174d9f4fe-3001x4500.jpg)

Team

![Team main](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/df491082e0b4ee7da64e1c877fb164bb687eb1a6-703x878.png)

##### Pioneering Collaboration

The feat of a team united in their commitment to create long-lasting, emotional experiences through the power of design.

> “Fashion takes its inspiration from society and everyday life.“

Domenico Dolce & Stefano Gabbana

![Team item](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/9e17d51ba066d4f82aecdf5c907d38ecf5cabd4c-2746x3432.jpg)

# 888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana

888 Brickell Ave Miami FL 33131

888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana is an ultra-luxury preconstruction condo tower rising 90 stories and 1,049 feet in the heart of [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"). Once complete, it will become the tallest building in Miami, offering 259 fully furnished, turnkey residences. The project is led by JDS Development Group and GV Development Group, with architecture by Studio Sofield, interiors by Dolce & Gabbana, and landscaping by Terrain. Its façade, clad in ivory travertine stone with sleek black accents, blends timeless elegance with bold modernity.

Episode 31: 888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Episode 31: 888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K6b-rUgfCyc) [Miami Real Estate TV](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCyDEUmfTBcmggUGFeD2HoXw)

![thumbnail-image](https://yt3.ggpht.com/ytc/AIdro_n8k-9gCfkQuvJRktDnEtIO37v1nnqnw_R3T-Ii_y3acQ=s68-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)

Miami Real Estate TV3.46K subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K6b-rUgfCyc)

## 888 Brickell Residences & Floor Plans

The residences at 888 Brickell will feature [floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/888-brickell-dolce-and-gabbana/floor-plans "888 Brickell floor plans") ranging from 1 to 4 bedrooms, including the Suite & Room Collection, Duplex Collection, and Penthouse Collection. Each home is styled with custom furnishings by Dolce & Gabbana and includes ceiling heights up to 11 feet, fully integrated Sub-Zero and Wolf kitchen appliances, and private or semi-private keyed elevator access. Residents will enjoy loggias with outdoor kitchens (in select units), smart home technology via a custom 888 building app, and the flexibility to convert part of their residence into a private hotel suite, offering a seamless fusion of home and hospitality.

## 888 Brickell Amenities

Residents will enjoy access to five-star amenities and hotel services, including a 44-foot lap pool, a private resident lounge, a theater, a billiards room, a children’s playroom, and creative workspaces. Wellness offerings include an indoor padel court, fitness center, spa with hot and cold plunge pools, IV therapy, salon, tailor shop, and yoga studio. The expansive 888 Pool Club features a 3,800-square-foot pool, private cabanas, two poolside bars, a Gelateria Italiana, and an all-day dining restaurant. Culinary experiences are also available at the signature 888 Restaurant & Bar, as well as a chef’s kitchen, which is perfect for private events. A 5,000-square-foot event space, complete with a private terrace and lounge, further enhances the offerings.

## Location & Proximity to Major Miami Destinations

Perfectly positioned on Brickell Avenue, 888 Brickell is within walking distance to fine dining, high-end shopping, cultural venues, and the Miami business district. Residents are minutes by car from South Beach, Design District, Wynwood, Coconut Grove, and Miami International Airport. With Biscayne Bay steps away, the tower offers a truly cosmopolitan lifestyle infused with waterfront serenity.

## Completion Date, Pricing & Deposit Structure

888 Brickell by Dolce & Gabbana is expected to be completed in Q2 2029. Residences at 888 Brickell promise world-class amenities, curated interiors, and unrivaled views of the Miami skyline.

[**888 Brickell Pricing**](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/888-Brickell-Price-Sheet.pdf "888 Brickell prices") (October 3, 2026 – contact us for updated pricing and availability)

**888 Brickell Deposit Structure**

- 20% at Contract
- 10% at Groundbreaking (Q2 2026)
- 20% at Top Off (Q4 2027)
- 50% at Closing (Q2 2029)

## Frequently asked questions

What is the walk score of Dolce & Gabbana?

Dolce & Gabbana has a walk score of 100, it's a walker's paradise.

What is the transit score of Dolce & Gabbana?

Dolce & Gabbana has a transit score of 95, it's a rider's paradise.

What schools are assigned to Dolce & Gabbana?

The schools assigned to Dolce & Gabbana include Shenandoah Middle School, Southside Elementary School, and Booker T. Washington Senior High School.

What neighborhood is Dolce & Gabbana in?

Dolce & Gabbana is in the Brickell neighborhood in Miami, FL.
